# Kalebtec

> Kalebtec is a technology consulting firm founded by Rowin Hernandez and Mari Hernandez. We partner with businesses to architect, build, and scale digital solutions — from software architecture and web development to AI automation and cloud infrastructure.

Kalebtec provides expert technology consulting services for businesses looking to build, scale, or transform their digital presence. Based remotely, we work with clients worldwide to deliver high-quality engineering and strategic technology guidance.

Website: https://kalebtec.com
Contact: hello@kalebtec.com

## Services

Kalebtec offers six core consulting services:

- [Software Architecture](/index.md): Designing scalable, maintainable system architectures — from microservices to monoliths
- [Web Development](/index.md): Full-stack web applications built with modern frameworks, fast, accessible, and beautiful by default
- [AI & Automation](/index.md): Intelligent automation and AI-powered solutions to streamline operations
- [Cloud Infrastructure](/index.md): Cloud-native solutions on AWS, GCP, and Azure optimized for performance, security, and cost
- [Technical Strategy](/index.md): Technology roadmaps and digital transformation aligned with business goals
- [Team Augmentation](/index.md): Embedded senior engineers who scale with your team when you need it most

## Team

- Rowin Hernandez — Co-Founder & CTO. Full-stack engineer and systems architect.
- Mari Hernandez — Co-Founder & CEO. Operations strategist and project manager.

## Pages

- [Homepage](/index.md): Full overview of Kalebtec — about, services, team, and contact
- [Projects](/projects.md): Portfolio of technology consulting projects
